title: WORKTREE-MANIFEST
description: Per-repo manifest declaring active worktrees and their lifecycle. Authority: flywheel-m9yxr research (2026-05-20). Mission Duty 3 (substrate-published). Sister: BRANCH-MANIFEST, STASH-POLICY.

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the main repo (not a worktree path).

path.description: Absolute worktree path. Conventionally /tmp/<repo>-<bead>-<role>-<pid> for ephemeral, or ../worktrees/wt-<topic> for long-lived.

branch.description: Branch checked out at this worktree, or 'DETACHED' if detached HEAD.

created_for_bead.description: Bead ID this worktree was created to satisfy. Required for accountability.

owner.description: Agent identity or pane id responsible for this worktree (e.g. flywheel:1, codex-worker-3, joshua-manual).

expires_at.description: When this worktree should be reaped if still in 'active' lifecycle_state. Defaults: ephemeral=24h, isolated-validate=2h, long-lived=14d.

lifecycle_state.description: active=in use; merged=branch merged to main; abandoned=worker BLOCKED/dropped; extracted=moved to another repo; closed=reaped (terminal).

purpose.description: Why this worktree exists. Drives default expires_at and reaper aggressiveness.

labels.description: Reaper carve-out labels: keep-alive, pending-pr, archived-snapshot, joshua-gated, cross-orch-active, defer-gated.

ports.description: Allocated ports per service (app, db, redis). Mirrors .worktree-ports.json from git-worktree-manager skill.
